This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] e.style['text-box'] = "auto" should set the property value
  assert_equals: serialization should be canonical expected "normal" but got "trim-both"
[FAIL] e.style['text-box'] = "ideographic" should set the property value
  assert_not_equals: property should be set got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] e.style['text-box'] = "cap ideographic none" should set the property value
  assert_not_equals: property should be set got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] e.style['text-box'] = "ideographic none" should set the property value
  assert_not_equals: property should be set got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] e.style['text-box'] = "text text trim-end" should set the property value
  assert_equals: serialization should be canonical expected "trim-end" but got "trim-end text"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
